confidence_rationale: This video is classified as instructional educational content featuring a physician presenting recovery guidelines and lifestyle advice for post-laparoscopic surgery patients. No FLS task performance is demonstrated. No surgeon or trainee is shown performing an endoloop task on a simulator or with training equipment. No ligating loop, foam appendage, grasper, scissors, or trainer box apparatus is visible.

verbal_cues: Recovery from laparoscopic surgery includes managing pain, sore throat, bathing, diet (avoid spices and oil), exercise, lifting restrictions, sexual activity timing, and return to work timeline

instructional_note: This is patient-facing or general education content about post-operative recovery, not a surgical skills demonstration. No FLS task scoring is applicable.
